text: There is a sense of quiet anticipation here. The lighting is dim, the spaces oddly tilted, and everything feels a bit off-kilter. I am unsettled, as if something is about to happen or has just happened. The clinical aspects—glass, fire hose, emergency signage—contrast with the creative intentions behind the R+D wall, amplifying my awareness of order and experimentation. I feel both curious and cautious, sensing preparation in the air yet also a lingering uncertainty. My own presence is both observer and participant, aware of being in transition.
